summary: package eu.kalafatic.evolution.view.editors; import org.eclipse.ui.PartInitException; import eu.kalafatic.evolution.model.orchestration.Orchestrator; import eu.kalafatic.evolution.view.editors.pages.ToolsPage; public class ToolsPageFactory { public static ToolsPage createToolsPage(MultiPageEditor editor, Orchestrator orchestrator) throws PartInitException { ToolsPage page = new ToolsPage(editor.getContainer(), editor, orchestrator); int index = editor.addPage(page); editor.setPageText(index, "Tools"); return page; } }
